_comment: Fictional demo channel-health snapshot for the sample product 'PingDesk'. All numbers are invented demo data. Tracks are generic: product_a, product_b, experimental.

youtube_product_a.evidence: demo data: last upload 1.2d ago; weekly cadence holding

blog_seo_product_a.evidence: demo data: 40 posts live; 2 published this week

ads_paid_product_a.evidence: demo data: 2 active campaigns; CTR within target band

newsletter_product_a.evidence: demo data: last send 9d ago; cadence slipping

tiktok_product_b.evidence: demo data: last post 3d ago; drip queue half full

blog_seo_product_b.evidence: demo data: pages live but per-post cadence not provable from sitemap

linkedin_product_b.evidence: demo data: no posting automation (skeleton built, login pending)

community_forum.evidence: demo data: daily scored opportunities page regenerating

outreach_pr.evidence: demo data: no sends in 14d; pipeline empty

pinterest_experimental.evidence: demo data: no driver yet (skeleton building); high-value for visual content

shorts_pipeline.evidence: demo data: paused — enough inventory produced
